Tests the behavior of Math.ceil with a string input that represents "NaN".

# Purpose
This code is a simple test case that verifies the behavior of the `Math.ceil` function when it receives a string input that represents "NaN". The `assert` function checks if the result of `Math.ceil("NaN")` is `NaN`, which is the expected behavior according to JavaScript's type conversion rules. This test ensures that the `Math.ceil` function correctly handles non-numeric string inputs by returning `NaN`. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of the `Math.ceil` function's behavior.
